issues.sample: REAR backup camera has upside down view.  Tried various remedies (reset, and battery disconnect) to fix issue but when vehicle is put into reverse camera has view that is upside down.  Dealer says camera and soft ware needs to be replaced but is not covered under vehicle warranty

narrative.headline: What 2019 Ford Flex owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 216 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Back Over Prevention (55% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
